## When To Choose This Package

Use

when your app already uses wagmi and you want Cubid's
React-friendly wallet adapters on top of the EVM package. Choose

instead for non-wagmi or framework-neutral EVM flows.

## Install

This package expects the host app to already provide its normal wagmi setup,
including

and the TanStack Query client.

## Registry Availability

- npm: supported
- JSR: not published by policy

## API Reference

- JSON reference:

for apps that want to wire
their own wagmi actions into the Cubid EVM adapter surface without using the
provided hook.
